pr.title: Bring over more of Cam's work on the DOL SDK and MW code
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Imported additional Dolphin SDK and MetroTRK/Metrowerks runtime work, replacing several raw asm files with C implementations and adding missing SDK-style headers. The PR converted db.s, dsp_debug.s, and fstload.s into C, added declarations and structs for DVD, DSP, DB, OSContext, PPCArch, and OSTime, added runtime memcpy and TRK_memcpy, and renamed several anonymous DVD/DSP asm symbols to SDK-like names. No review comments or PR body text were present in the slice.

key_files.reason: New C replacement for asm/dolphin/db/db.s, including DBInit, DBIsDebuggerPresent, __DBIsExceptionMarked, DBPrintf stub, and an exception destination implemented with inline asm.
New C replacement for asm/dolphin/dvd/fstload.s implementing __fstLoad, disk ID/FST loading state callback logic, OSReport output, and arena update.
New C replacement for dsp_debug.s containing an empty variadic __DSP_debug_printf stub.
Kept in asm but renamed anonymous func_ symbols to SDK-style __DSP_exec_task, __DSP_boot_task, __DSP_insert_task, and __DSP_remove_task.
Kept in asm but renamed many call targets to SDK-like names such as __fstLoad, stateReady, DVDReset, DVDReadAbsAsyncPrio, DVDReadAbsAsyncForBS, DVDReadDiskID, and DVDGetDriveStatus.
New DVD header defining DVDDiskID, DVDCommandBlock, DVDFileInfo, callback typedefs, public DVD API declarations, and DVDReadAsync macro.
Expanded DSP header with DSPTaskInfo layout, callback typedef, OSTime include, debug printf prototype, and internal task function prototypes.
New DB header defining DBInterface and debugger API prototypes.
New OSContext layout and context function declarations used by DB exception dumping.
New PPCArch header with GQR register constants and PPCHalt prototype.
Added runtime memcpy with forward/backward copy behavior and cleaned __fill_mem pointer style.
Swapped object list entries from asm to new C files for db, dsp_debug, fstload, and added MetroTRK mem_TRK.c to INIT_O_FILES.

what_changed: Deleted asm/dolphin/db/db.s and added src/dolphin/db/db.c as a C implementation of the DB subsystem functions.
Deleted asm/dolphin/dsp/dsp_debug.s and added src/dolphin/dsp/dsp_debug.c with an empty variadic __DSP_debug_printf implementation.
Deleted asm/dolphin/dvd/fstload.s and added src/dolphin/dvd/fstload.c implementing __fstLoad and its read callback.
Added SDK-style headers for DVD, DB, PPCArch, and OSContext, and expanded existing DSP, OSTime, and OS umbrella headers.
Renamed anonymous DSP task routines in asm from func_80336680/80336820/803369AC/80336A4C to __DSP_exec_task, __DSP_boot_task, __DSP_insert_task, and __DSP_remove_task.

Renamed DVD asm call targets and globals from func_ names to more meaningful SDK names such as stateReady, DVDReset, DVDReadAbsAsyncPrio, DVDReadAbsAsyncForBS, DVDReadDiskID, DVDGetDriveStatus, and __fstLoad.
Added memcpy to src/Runtime/__mem.c and declared it in src/Runtime/__mem.h as an init-section runtime function.
Added src/MetroTRK/mem_TRK.c and mem_TRK.h with TRK_memcpy/TRK_memset declarations for the .init section.
Updated obj_files.mk so the build uses new C objects for db, dsp_debug, fstload, and MetroTRK memory code instead of the removed asm objects.
Adjusted some existing asm references in OSReboot, dvdfs, dsp, and melee lb code to call the newly named DVD/DSP symbols.
smart_moves: Moved known SDK routines out of raw asm into small C files while preserving build order through obj_files.mk updates.
Introduced headers before or alongside C replacements, giving future decomp work shared struct layouts and prototypes instead of relying on include/functions.h guesses.
Used SDK-style internal naming with double-underscore prefixes for private DSP/FST symbols, improving searchability and aligning names with Dolphin SDK conventions.
Kept difficult or not-yet-decompiled DVD/DSP logic in asm while still improving it by naming call targets, reducing future reverse-engineering friction without forcing full C conversion.
Matched trivial variadic debug stubs with empty C functions, avoiding unnecessary hand asm for functions that only preserve arguments and return.
Implemented DB exception destination as a small C wrapper plus inline asm for MSR manipulation, isolating the non-C portion to the exact low-level operation.
Added memcpy with overlap-aware forward/backward copy behavior, matching the expected runtime behavior rather than using a naive byte loop.
decomp_lessons: When decompiling SDK code, adding canonical headers and struct layouts can be as valuable as matching individual functions because later files can reuse the same types.
A staged approach is effective: rename known asm labels first, then convert isolated files to C once enough symbols and prototypes are known.
Empty variadic SDK/debug functions can often match as simple C stubs, but their signatures still matter for call sites and varargs ABI behavior.
Runtime functions in the init section need explicit __declspec(section ".init") declarations in their headers to preserve placement.
For low-level OS/DB code, small inline asm islands may be acceptable when the surrounding function can be expressed in C.
DVD and DSP subsystems use callback-heavy structs; defining callback typedefs and field offsets early helps avoid brittle void-pointer code later.
Object file list changes are part of the decompilation: replacing asm with C is only complete when obj_files.mk is updated to preserve link order and section placement.
naming_conventions: Internal Dolphin SDK functions use double-underscore prefixes, e.g. __DSP_debug_printf, __DSP_boot_task, __DSP_insert_task, __DSP_remove_task, __DSP_exec_task, and __fstLoad.
Public SDK APIs use subsystem prefixes such as DVDInit, DVDReset, DVDGetDriveStatus, DVDReadDiskID, DBInit, DBIsDebuggerPresent, OSReport, OSDumpContext, and PPCHalt.
DSP task struct is named DSPTaskInfo with fields reflecting SDK task concepts: state, priority, flags, iram/dram addresses and lengths, callback fields, next/prev links, and OSTime members.
DVD callback typedefs distinguish command-block callbacks and file callbacks: DVDCBCallback and DVDCallback.
OS time aliases follow SDK names OSTime for s64 and OSTick for u32.
MetroTRK memory routines use TRK_ prefixes, e.g. TRK_memcpy and TRK_memset.
Header guards in this slice use Dolphin-style uppercase names such as __DOLPHIN_DB_H__, __DOLPHIN_DVD_H_, _DOLPHIN_OSCONTEXT_H_, and _DOLPHIN_PPCARCH_H_.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced entire asm files when the functions were small or well-understood: db.s, dsp_debug.s, and fstload.s became C source files.
Left large DVD/DSP asm files in place but renamed branch targets/callees to meaningful symbols to support future incremental matching.
Used a Metrowerks-specific `static asm` implementation of __DBExceptionDestination under __MWERKS__, with a non-MWERKS inline asm fallback.
The DB exception entry manipulates MSR with mfmsr/ori/mtmsr and branches to a C helper, preserving low-level behavior while letting the helper use OSReport and OSDumpContext.
Runtime memcpy copies forward when src >= dst and backward otherwise, a common matching tactic for overlapping memory ranges.
TRK_memcpy uses pre-decremented pointers and increments n before a `while (--n != 0)` loop, matching typical CodeWarrior-generated byte-copy structure.
fstload.c models async DVD reads as a small status state machine and waits on DVDGetDriveStatus before copying disk metadata to 0x80000000.
The build swap in obj_files.mk preserves ordering while changing object sources from asm to C, which is critical for DOL layout matching.
searchable_terms: Cam work DOL SDK MW code
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that continue decompiling asm/dolphin/dvd/dvd.s after the stateReady/DVDReset renames.
Find later PRs that refine DVDCommandBlock, DVDFileInfo, or bb2struct field names and sizes.
Find later PRs that replace asm/dolphin/dsp/dsp_task.s with C using the DSPTaskInfo header added here.
Find later PRs that adjust __DBExceptionDestination or DBInterface to better match the Dolphin SDK.
Find later PRs touching src/Runtime/__mem.c or src/MetroTRK/mem_TRK.c for memcpy/TRK_memset matching fixes.
